name: nopilot-co-utilities
description: nopilot-co-utilities marketplace — small, brand-agnostic utility skills that support the studios and general workflows.

plugins.name: youtube-transcript
plugins.description: Extract a YouTube video's transcript to a .txt/.md — captions fast-path + optional local Whisper fallback, plus optional YAML front matter, timestamps & chapter sections. Standalone CLI: yt-transcript.

plugins.name: notion-sources
plugins.description: Extract a Notion database into a batch of per-source Markdown files (one per row, YAML front matter) plus a manifest (sources.json + index.md). Schema-agnostic: detects URLs anywhere in a row and maps metadata by property type + fuzzy name, handling differently-structured databases. Re-runs append new sources. Standalone CLI: notion-sources.

plugins.name: source-enrich
plugins.description: Enrich a notion-sources batch in place: fetch each source, fully populate its front matter, extract the article body to Markdown, download attached assets (inline images + linked documents) into assets/<slug>/, and append an Appendix. Tiered fetch (Python engine + youtube-transcript + an --html-file escalation path for auth-walled sources like LinkedIn). Resumable. Standalone CLI: source-enrich.
